prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 6.4L HEMI (engine code: ESG) with a stroked 7.0L version using a K1 Technologies forged crankshaft (4.125" stroke), Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (10.5:1 compression), and Manley H-beam connecting rods for 650+ WHP on E85 with a custom camshaft from Comp Cams (281°/289° duration, .624"/.630" lift, 114° LSA).

Forced Induction: Install a ProCharger P-1SC-1 supercharger kit with a custom intercooler setup (VMP Racing front-mount intercooler, 4-core, 1,200 CFM) and a Tial 44mm wastegate to manage boost at 10 PSI, paired with a Fuelab dual-feed fuel pump and ID1700x injectors for E85 compatibility.

Drivetrain: Swap the stock 8HP75 transmission for a ZF 8HP95 with a Level 10 torque converter (3,800 RPM stall) and a custom driveshaft from Tom Wood’s Custom Driveshafts (3.5" aluminum, 1350 U-joints). Upgrade the Dana 44 axles with Yukon Gear 5.13:1 ring & pinion sets, ARB Air Locker differentials, and Chromoly axle shafts from RCV Performance.
estetica: Body: Install a Raw Designs JL Wrangler widebody kit (6" fender flares, carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractors) and a custom front bumper from Poison Spyder (with integrated Baja Designs LP9 auxiliary lights and a Warn Zeon 12-S winch).

Suspension: Replace stock suspension with a Rock Krawler 3.5" X-Factor Stage 3 long-arm kit (with Fox 2.5" DSC coilovers and remote reservoirs) and TeraFlex JK/JL HD adjustable track bars for improved articulation and off-road stability.

Wheels/Tires: Mount 17x9 Fuel Trophy wheels (offset +12mm) with 37x12.5R17 Nitto Ridge Grappler tires, paired with a custom hydraulic lift system from GenRight Off-Road for additional clearance when needed.
